requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Covered Lamps and Lighting Products (NRCan)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——受管制灯及照明产品（NRCan）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——受管制燈及照明產品（NRCan）

summary.en: Some LED lamps and lighting products are regulated energy-using products in Canada. Where the product is covered, the mandatory obligation is the Energy Efficiency Act and Energy Efficiency Regulations administered by Natural Resources Canada (NRCan), including prescribed efficiency requirements, energy efficiency reporting before import or interprovincial shipment, and required markings. A complete LED luminaire may be outside some lamp-specific categories, but integrated or included lamps must be checked against NRCan coverage definitions.
summary.zh: 部分 LED 灯及照明产品在加拿大属于受管制用能产品。产品被覆盖时，强制义务来自加拿大自然资源部（NRCan）执行的《能源效率法》及《能源效率条例》，包括规定能效要求、进口或跨省运输前的能效报告以及必要标识。完整 LED 灯具可能不属于某些灯类特定类别，但集成或随附的灯须按 NRCan 覆盖定义核查。
summary.zht: 部分 LED 燈及照明產品在加拿大屬於受管制用能產品。產品被覆蓋時，強制義務來自加拿大自然資源部（NRCan）執行的《能源效率法》及《能源效率條例》，包括規定能效要求、進口或跨省運輸前的能效報告以及必要標識。完整 LED 燈具可能不屬於某些燈類特定類別，但集成或隨附的燈須按 NRCan 覆蓋定義核查。

standards_or_laws: NRCan regulated energy-using product requirements for lighting products

summary.en: China uses mandatory or voluntary energy efficiency standards and energy labels for specific lighting products, such as GB 30255 for LED products and China Energy Label coverage where applicable. Chinese energy labels and test values do not replace NRCan reporting, Canadian product-class definitions, or Canadian marking requirements.
summary.zh: 中国对特定照明产品采用强制或自愿能效标准及能效标识，例如 LED 产品相关 GB 30255 及适用情况下的中国能效标识。中国能效标签和测试值不能替代 NRCan 报告、加拿大产品类别定义或加拿大标识要求。
summary.zht: 中國對特定照明產品採用強制或自願能效標準及能效標識，例如 LED 產品相關 GB 30255 及適用情況下的中國能效標識。中國能效標籤和測試值不能替代 NRCan 報告、加拿大產品類別定義或加拿大標識要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades of LED products
China Energy Label rules where applicable

gap.en: The main gap is scope classification. Canada may regulate the replaceable lamp, general service lamp, reflector lamp, or other lighting product separately from the luminaire housing. A Chinese luminaire file often lacks NRCan model number alignment, Canadian test standard references, import reporting data, and bilingual energy-related markings. Confirm whether the importer or dealer has filed the required NRCan energy efficiency report before shipment.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于范围分类。加拿大可能将可替换灯、普通照明灯、反射灯或其他照明产品与灯具外壳分开监管。中国灯具文件通常缺少 NRCan 型号对应、加拿大测试标准引用、进口报告数据及双语能效相关标识。出货前应确认进口商或经销商是否已提交所需 NRCan 能效报告。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於範圍分類。加拿大可能將可替換燈、普通照明燈、反射燈或其他照明產品與燈具外殼分開監管。中國燈具文件通常缺少 NRCan 型號對應、加拿大測試標準引用、進口報告數據及雙語能效相關標識。出貨前應確認進口商或經銷商是否已提交所需 NRCan 能效報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when covered — NRCan energy efficiency requirements apply to regulated lighting products under the Energy Efficiency Act and Regulations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or voluntary depending on product type — Chinese energy efficiency standards and China Energy Label scope must be checked separately

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NRCan energy efficiency obligations are not universal for every LED luminaire, but they are mandatory for covered lamps and lighting products. Treat the Energy Efficiency Act and Regulations as the obligation; product-specific test standards are the compliance method. China energy labels do not replace NRCan reporting.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】NRCan 能效义务并非适用于每一种 LED 灯具，但对受管制灯及照明产品是强制的。应将《能源效率法》及《能源效率条例》作为义务来源；具体产品测试标准是合规方法。中国能效标签不能替代 NRCan 报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】NRCan 能效義務並非適用於每一種 LED 燈具，但對受管制燈及照明產品是強制的。應將《能源效率法》及《能源效率條例》作為義務來源；具體產品測試標準是合規方法。中國能效標籤不能替代 NRCan 報告。
